title: Verify local artifact and diagnostic protection
preconditions: Published executable on a supported protected-volume host plus canary descriptions, raw evidence and provider payloads, mailbox and messaging content, identifiers, credentials, and structured financial payloads.
steps: Run normal, failure, evidence, reconciliation, attribution, pool, backup, restore, evolution, External Orchestrator, and optional-skill flows; inspect artifact modes, process arguments, explicit data-return boundaries, stderr, logs, and manifests for canaries.
expected: Data root and financial artifacts are owner-only; the maintained host-protection gate is validated; forbidden raw evidence, provider, credential, unmasked identifier, and payload canaries appear in no process argument or non-data-return output.
